task.title: Generate graph-first CodeWiki index
task.summary: TASK-044: Graph-first index with build/test/validation nodes, verifier removed, close flow simplified.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki rebuild produces `.codewiki/index_graph.json` as the primary generated graph and treats any remaining status/queue outputs as cached graph lenses.
acceptance: `.codewiki/index_graph.json` is generated by rebuild rather than manually copied.
Graph contains nodes/edges for knowledge docs, roadmap tasks, builds, validation reports, and code/test manifests where available.
Status/queue surfaces either read from the graph or are explicitly documented cached graph queries.
Legacy task-context view generation is removed or isolated behind a compatibility path.
non_goals: Remove all compatibility files in the same task.
verification: npm test or targeted smoke coverage for rebuild/state
